issues.detail: The skill lacks explicit error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on happy paths.
The documentation contains extensive explanatory text that could be trimmed for brevity.
The implementation relies on Node.js/TypeScript libraries, limiting compatibility with agents that do not support these runtimes.

scenarios.name: schedule-recurring-standup-outlook
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers authentication, event creation, attendees, Teams meeting flags, and a weekly recurrence, but it uses a recurrence object instead of the exact rule string required by the rubric; Response B is empty.

scenarios.name: find-free-slot-google-meet
scenarios.rationale: Response B implements most steps but omits creating the event and adding the third attendee, whereas Response A is missing entirely.
